tools.name: search_integration
tools.description: Search for integrations in the HubSpot Integrations Center by query string. Returns matching integrations with their details including title, summary, body, URL, categories, and last updated date.

tools.name: get_integration
tools.description: Retrieve a specific integration by ts ID from the HubSpot Integrations Center. Returns the full integration details including title, summary, body, URL, categories, and last updated date.
